steps.title: Set up the equations
steps.content:
Let $s$ be the side length of the square base and $h$ be the height. The volume is:
$$
s^2h=468
$$
Each lateral face has area:
$$
sh=78
$$

steps.title: Find the base side
steps.content:
Divide the volume equation by the lateral-face equation:
$$
\frac{s^2h}{sh}=\frac{468}{78}
$$
$$
s=6
$$

steps.title: Find the height
steps.content: Substitute $s=6$ into $sh=78$: $$ 6h=78 $$ $$ h=13 $$ The answer is C.
